visual_description: In a dark, nighttime battlefield, two massive shirtless figures stand over fallen soldiers, brandishing weapons. The view shifts to a group of armored troops, some lying dead, with a torch flickering nearby. Suddenly, a large explosion erupts from a stone building, sending fire and debris into the air as several cloaked individuals run away.
audio_description: The audio captures chaotic combat sounds and a sudden, loud explosion. No clear speech is audible.
